task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the system and opened the Menu Item creation window.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS Back Office is open, and a 'New Menu Item' or 'Edit Menu Item' dialog box is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the menu item name and price are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' text field contains exactly 'Firecracker Shrimp' and the 'Price' (or Base Price) text field contains '12.99'.

task_completion.description: Verify the item is assigned to a group and set to visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A valid category/group is selected in the 'Group' dropdown menu (it is not empty), and the 'Visible' checkbox is checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the button color is configured as RED.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Button Color setting shows RED. Look for a color picker dialog selecting red, or a preview button/box displaying a distinctly red background.

task_completion.description: Verify the text color is configured as WHITE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Text Color setting shows WHITE. Look for a color picker dialog selecting white, or a preview button/box displaying distinctly white text.

task_completion.description: Verify the new menu item is saved and appears in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Firecracker Shrimp' item is listed in the main Menu Items table or list in the Floreant POS Back Office, indicating it was successfully saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Floreant POS GUI to create the item.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Floreant POS graphical interface (dialog boxes, text fields, color pickers), not terminal commands or direct database SQL inserts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the color picker or UI to set colors.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the color selection dialogs (Java JColorChooser or similar) or UI elements being interacted with.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just write the expected values in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values 'Firecracker Shrimp', '12.99', RED, and WHITE must be entered into the actual POS application fields, not a notepad, browser, or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a menu item named 'Firecracker Shrimp' priced at 12.99 in Floreant POS. The item must have a RED button color (Java Color.RED, RGB -65536) and a WHITE text color (Java Color.WHITE, RGB -1). It must also be assigned to a group and have the 'Visible' property enabled. Verify these exact properties are set within the Floreant POS graphical user interface.
